title: Epidemiology Associate
description: Mass General Brigham is seeking an Epidemiology Associate to support our research and population health initiatives. You'll analyze health data, assist with research studies, and contribute to projects aimed at improving patient outcomes. This remote role offers meaningful work in population health science and the opportunity to contribute to healthcare advancement.
responsibilities: Perform data collection, entry, and cleaning for epidemiological studies
Conduct literature reviews and assist with research protocol development
Analyze health data using statistical software; support publication preparation
Maintain confidentiality of patient data; ensure compliance with HIPAA
Support grant applications and research documentation

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Epidemiology, Public Health, or related life sciences field
skills: Proficiency with statistical software (R, Python, SAS, or STATA)
Strong data management and organizational skills
Understanding of data privacy and healthcare regulations

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
